query:
SELECT
                strftime('%Y-%m-%d', detected_at / 1000, 'unixepoch') AS "day!: String",
                COUNT(*) AS "total!: i64",
                SUM(CASE WHEN snippet_path IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "with_clip!: i64"
              FROM detections
              WHERE detected_at >= $1
              GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m-%d', detected_at / 1000, 'unixepoch')
              ORDER BY 1 DESC
